title: ‘Bookends’ Star and Writer Noam Ash on Authentic Queer and Jewish Casting and How ‘Heated Rivalry’ Could Help Sell the Film
title_zh: 《書的兩端》明星兼編劇諾亞姆·阿什（Noam Ash）談真實的酷兒與猶太人選角，以及《激烈競爭》（Heated Rivalry）如何幫助推銷這部電影。

title: Michael Douglas Says ‘Wall Street’ Director Asked ‘Are You Doing Drugs?’ Because ‘You Look Like You’ve Never Acted Before in Your Life.’ Then Douglas Won the Oscar
title_zh: 邁克爾·道格拉斯表示，《華爾街》的導演曾問他「你在吸毒嗎？」因為「你看起來就像從來沒有演過戲。」然後道格拉斯獲得了奧斯卡獎。
